texto: But it was so much more. In that white blouse you wore, you looked like Grace Kelly, sharing a joke with a schnauzer, then you smiled at me and i was included, the three of us alone together. I thought, there's a woman I could die for.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Phillipa Fioretti: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a amor. O trecho “But it was so much more. In that white blouse you wore, you looked like Grace Kelly, sharing a jo…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, romance-novels, william-isyanov pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de william-isyanov.

frase_original: But it was so much more. In that white blouse you wore, you looked like Grace Kelly, sharing a joke with a schnauzer, then you smiled at me and i was included, the three of us alone together. I thought, there's a woman I could die for.
